entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The host plant affected by Sterility Mosaic Disease

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A major virus disease of pigeonpea, also known as the Green Plague

entities.name: CAUSAL VIRUS
entities.description: The virus responsible for causing Sterility Mosaic Disease

entities.name: ERIOPHYID MITE
entities.description: The vector responsible for transmitting the causal virus of SMD

entities.name: ISOLATION
entities.description: The process of separating the causal virus from the host plant

entities.name: PURIFICATION
entities.description: The process of refining the causal virus for detailed study

entities.name: DIAGNOSTICS
entities.description: Methods used to identify and detect the causal virus

entities.name: SCREENING METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to identify virus resistance in pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: VIRUS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to resist infection by the SMD causal virus

entities.name: DISEASE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies and practices used to control and manage the spread of SMD

entities.name: SMD EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the patterns, causes, and effects of SMD in pigeonpea populations
